description: Calculate the Luminous Intensity (Candela) for a light source with 4500 Lumens and a 36-degree beam angle using the Electrical Engineering Calculations app. Save a screenshot of the result to /sdcard/tasks/lumens_to_candela/screenshot.png and save the numeric result, rounded to the nearest whole number, to /sdcard/tasks/lumens_to_candela/result.txt.
